hindi: ॐ नमस्ते गणपतये। त्वमेव प्रत्यक्षं तत्त्वमसि।
english: Om, salutations to Ganesha. You alone are the visible truth (Tat tvam asi)
roman: Om namaste Ganapate. Tvameva pratyaksham tattvamasi

hindi: त्वमेव केवलं कर्तासि। त्वमेव केवलं धर्तासि। त्वमेव केवलं हर्तासि।
english: You alone are the doer, you alone are the sustainer, you alone are the destroyer
roman: Tvameva kevalam kartasi. Tvameva kevalam dhartasi. Tvameva kevalam hartasi

hindi: त्वमेव सर्वं खल्विदं ब्रह्मासि। त्वं साक्षादात्मासि नित्यम्॥
english: You truly are all this — you are Brahman; you are directly the eternal self
roman: Tvameva sarvam khalvidam Brahmasi. Tvam sakshad atmaasi nityam

english: I speak what is right. I speak what is true

hindi: अव त्वं मां। अव वक्तारम्। अव श्रोतारम्। अव दातारम्।
english: Protect me, protect the speaker, protect the listener, protect the giver
roman: Ava tvam maam. Ava vaktaram. Ava shrotaram. Ava dataram

hindi: त्वं गुणत्रयातीतः। त्वं देहत्रयातीतः। त्वं कालत्रयातीतः।
english: You are beyond the three qualities, beyond the three bodies, beyond the three times
roman: Tvam gunatrayatitah. Tvam dehatrayatitah. Tvam kalatrayatitah

english: You are ever established in the Muladhara. You are the essence of the three Shaktis
roman: Tvam muladhara sthitosi nityam. Tvam shakti traatmakah

hindi: यो दूर्वाङ्कुरैः पूजयति स वैश्रवणोपमो भवति।
english: Whoever worships with Durva grass-sprouts becomes equal to Kubera in wealth
roman: Yo durvankuraih pujayati sa Vaishravano pamo bhavati

english: Whoever worships with a thousand modakas attains all desired fruits
roman: Yo modaka sahasrena yajati sa vanchita phalamavapnoti
